src: AWS Lambda Power Tuning is an open-source tool that can help you visualize and fine-tune the memory/power configuration of Lambda functions. It runs in your own AWS account - powered by AWS Step Functions - and it supports three optimization strategies: cost, speed, and balanced.
ja: AWS Lambda Power Tuningは、Lambda関数のメモリ/パワー設定を可視化・最適化するオープンソースツール。AWS Step Functionsを基盤に自分のAWSアカウント内で動作し、コスト・速度・バランスの3つの最適化戦略をサポート
